name: Taper Cut
description: A haircut where the hair gradually becomes shorter towards the nape of the neck and ears.

name: Wavy Man Bun
description: A man's hairstyle where long, wavy hair is gathered and tied into a bun.

name: Medium Bob
description: A bob haircut that falls around the collarbone or slightly above or below it.

name: Pixie with Bangs
description: A short, textured haircut with varying lengths, paired with fringe or bangs.

name: Layered Bob
description: A bob haircut with different lengths of hair cut throughout to add volume and movement.

name: Sleek Lob
description: A long bob (lob) that is styled straight and smooth.

name: Loose Waves
description: Soft, relaxed waves that create a natural and effortless appearance.

name: Half-Up Bun
description: The top section of hair is pulled up and styled into a bun, while the rest remains down.

name: Soft Shag
description: A modern take on the shag haircut with softer layers and a blended texture.

name: Beach Waves
description: Textured waves that mimic the look of hair after a day at the beach.

name: Classic Braid
description: A simple three-strand braid.

name: Messy Layers
description: A layered haircut styled with a deliberately tousled and undone appearance.

name: Curtain Bangs
description: Bangs that are parted in the middle and frame the face.

name: Fringe Fade
description: A men's haircut where the fringe blends into a faded cut.

name: Butterfly Cut
description: A layered haircut with shorter layers around the face that blend into longer lengths.

name: Bold Bangs
description: Thick, statement-making bangs.

name: Feathered Cut
description: A haircut with soft, wispy layers.

name: Long Layers
description: Hair with varying lengths of layers throughout.

name: Braided Updo
description: Braids styled and pinned up.

name: Pixie Cut
description: A short haircut, typically shorter on the back and sides and slightly longer on top.

name: Baby Bangs
description: Very short bangs that sit high on the forehead.

name: Slicked Back Undercut
description: Hair styled back smoothly with product, with shaved sides and back.

name: French Braid
description: A braid where sections of hair are added as it is being created.

name: Face-Framing Layers
description: Layers cut around the face to highlight features.

name: Layered Crop
description: A short, cropped haircut with layers.

name: Textured Pixie
description: A pixie cut with added texture.

name: Crew Cut
description: A very short men's haircut.

name: Textured Fringe
description: Bangs with a textured appearance.

name: Classic Bob
description: A bob haircut that is typically one length and falls around the jawline.

name: Blunt Bangs
description: Straight-across bangs with a sharp, even edge.

name: Short Crop
description: A very short haircut.

name: Wavy Side Sweep
description: Wavy hair swept to one side.

name: Man Bun
description: Long hair gathered and tied into a bun.

name: Low Fade
description: Hair gradually becomes shorter on the sides and back, starting low.

name: Shoulder-Length Layers
description: Hair that falls to the shoulders with layers.

name: Voluminous Curls
description: Full, bouncy curls.

name: Blunt Bob
description: A bob haircut with a sharp, even cut at the ends.

name: Half-Up Ponytail
description: The top section of hair is pulled back and secured in a ponytail.

name: Caesar Cut
description: A men's haircut with short, horizontally straight bangs.

name: Faux Hawk
description: A hairstyle where a section of hair is styled to stand upright, resembling a mohawk.

name: Angled Bob
description: A bob haircut that is shorter in the back and gradually gets longer towards the front.

name: Micro Bangs
description: Very short bangs, shorter than baby bangs.

name: Messy Fringe
description: Bangs with a textured, slightly disheveled appearance.

name: Asymmetrical Cut
description: A haircut where the hair is uneven, with different lengths on each side.

name: Flat Top
description: A men's haircut where the hair is styled to stand upright and form a flat surface on top.

name: Twisted Bun
description: Hair styled into a bun with a twisted texture.

name: Chin-Length Layers
description: Layers that fall around the chin length.

name: Layered Shag
description: A shag haircut with distinct layers for texture and volume.
